paragraphs.text: AI/ML Engineer with 4+ years of experience developing machine learning models, NLP applications, recommendation systems, fraud analytics solutions, and scalable AI pipelines using Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, SQL, and AWS. Hands-on experience building LLM-powered applications, real-time inference systems, predictive analytics workflows, and MLOps pipelines supporting enterprise fintech environments. Strong background in feature engineering, model optimization, API development, time-series forecasting, model deployment, and cloud-based machine learning solutions using LangChain, MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes, FastAPI, Kafka, and SageMaker. Experienced collaborating with analytics, engineering, and business teams delivering production-ready artificial intelligence solutions supporting operational efficiency and data-driven decision-making.
Experienced ai/ml engineer | data scientist with {yearsExp} of hands-on experience across {industries}.
